compiled_state.title: Remove .tickets/ v2 exemptions from cascade-circuit-breaker.sh and review-stop-check.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Remove v2 path exemptions from hook passthrough lists in cascade-circuit-breaker.sh, review-stop-check.sh, and record-review.sh.

## cascade-circuit-breaker.sh

Remove the v2 tickets case pattern from the passthrough block. BEFORE: the case includes old-tickets path. AFTER: remove that pattern only; keep CLAUDE.md and .claude/ patterns.

## review-stop-check.sh (lines 35-37)

Remove the three grep -v filters that exclude the old v2 path from changed-file detection. The v3 event-sourced path is managed separately.

## record-review.sh (lines 241, 250, 307)

Remove old v2 path from the three diff exclusion arrays and grep patterns.

## TDD Requirement
Failing tests from task 014f-a652 must be green after this change.

## Files to edit
- plugins/dso/hooks/cascade-circuit-breaker.sh
- plugins/dso/hooks/review-stop-check.sh
- plugins/dso/hooks/record-review.sh
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

- [ ] cascade-circuit-breaker.sh case block no longer contains the v2 flat-file path pattern
  Verify: ! grep -q '\.tickets/\*' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/cascade-circuit-breaker.sh

- [ ] review-stop-check.sh no longer contains grep -v filters for the v2 path
  Verify: ! grep -q "grep -v '\^\\.tickets'" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/review-stop-check.sh

- [ ] record-review.sh diff exclusion arrays no longer contain v2 path exclusions
  Verify: ! grep -q "':!\.tickets/'" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/hooks/record-review.sh

- [ ] RED tests from task 014f-a652 now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/hooks/test-cascade-breaker.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'PASS'

- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: task complete, committed in batch 9
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
